programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family $50, and Lisa anonymously donates her money to Nelson to support his dream of making custom bicycles. During a visit to an upmarket department store, Marge decides to buy an expensive handbag and promises Homer she will return it. When the item is successfully returned for a full refund, despite signs of wear and tear, Homer is inspired to buy things he cannot afford with the intention of taking them back at a later date

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is persuaded to work on her extracurricular activities by her new idol Dahlia Brinkley, Springfield Elementary's only pupil to make it to an Ivy League college. The student seizes the opportunity to coach Bart's Little League team, but sibling rivalry soon takes hold and there is more bickering than baseball

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Johnny Vegas, Anthony Boyle, Charlie Higson, Oti Mabuse and Jenson Button. Plus, music in the studio from Rag'n'Bone Man

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is dumbfounded to discover Marge was an A-grade student, and decides to investigate how she ended up being an ordinary Springfield housewife. Bart accidentally dethrones Nelson as the playground bully, and Maggie becomes obsessed with a collectable elf figurine

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns is given six weeks to live, and the town erupts into a party mood. Shocked by their reaction, he decides to take his own life and jumps off a cliff, but fate intervenes and he suffers from a bout of amnesia

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santa's Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada (2006)
programme.desc: A woman with dreams of becoming a journalist takes a job as assistant to the editor of a prestigious fashion magazine - a position that should guarantee a bright future if she succeeds. Unfortunately, she has just signed up to work for the boss from hell, whose cruel personality and outrageous demands make her life a nightmare. Comedy drama, with Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer return to find out how some of the families they have helped are getting on since they decided whether to redesign their problematic homes or sell up and move on. They begin with Paul and Dawn from the first edition back in April 2015, who were at loggerheads over what to do with their detached country home. Its isolated location on the outskirts of Huddersfield made it perfect for astronomy fanatic Paul, but Dawn was desperate to move, hating its dysfunctional layout

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Professional deep-sea diver Adrian Corrigall and his wife Megan plan to build their new family home in rural East Sussex almost entirely out of concrete, with construction involving cutting-edge technologies conceived in Switzerland and never used to build a house before. However, the perils of being a pioneer soon become evident, and with both schedule and budget under strain, Adrian is forced to resume work as a diver, taking him away from the project for a month at a time

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Action from the fourth round of the season, held at Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya. Lewis Hamilton of Mercedes has triumphed here in each of the last four years, but the likes of teammate Valtteri Bottas and Red Bull's Max Verstappen will have hoped to push him all the way this time around. With analysis from David Coulthard and Billy Monger

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 21 new recruits for the sixth series face an intense start when the train they are travelling on is the subject of a fake hijack to test the passengers' reactions. The trainees are then pitted them against each other in a race up a 4000ft mountain, followed by a 100ft abseil off an oil rig, as the team of instructors look for people who can handle anything that is thrown at them

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: The head of an African American crime syndicate goes to war with the Italian mafia in Kansas City, Missouri in the 1950s and an uneasy truce between two factions is threatened by an untimely death. Irrepressible nurse Oraetta Mayflower attends to a dying patient, Loy Cannon trades safety for power, while the Smutny family's financial woes forces its members into making a dangerous deal. Chris Rock and Jessie Buckley star

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran lifeguard commands a highly trained team that keeps the sun-kissed resort of Emerald Bay safe. As he breaks in some new recruits - including an insubordinate former Olympic swimmer - he has to contend with a dangerous new drug sweeping the beach. Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jen and Callum kick off the dinner party challenge in Aberdeen with an American-themed menu, while Debbie and her husband Shaun opt for Scottish-inspired dishes on the second night. Day three sees Sam and her boyfriend Jamie host, with each of the couples divulging their pet names for one another, before the winner of the £1,000 cash prize is revealed at the end of the night

programme.title: The Handmaid's Tale
programme.desc: June and the rest of the Handmaids shun Ofmatthew, and both are pushed to their limit at the hands of Aunt Lydia, who reflects on her life and relationships before the rise of Gilead. Dystopian drama continuing the story of Margaret Atwood's novel, starring Elisabeth Moss

programme.title: Kirstie: Keep Crafting and Carry On
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from the past week's programmes, including tips on making light boxes, paper flowers, 3D models, origami and a name sign for a child's room. Plus, memorable moments from Kirstie's other series and ideas for craft projects sent in by viewers

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall host the quiz show in which contestants start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she discovers the secret of home-made handscrub and learns about beekeeping and making beeswax candles. She also tries her hand at crafting jewellery in silver clay - an ideal way of making unusual but inexpensive gifts

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with naturalist Chris Packham in Dictionary Corner, alongside wordsmith Susie Dent

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: At Diane's request, the guys take Frasier hunting in the woods - but end up sneaking off and abandoning him miles from anywhere. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane struggles to understand why Sam has agreed to take part in a charity softball game - until she finds out the opposing team is made up of glamorous Playboy Playmates. Ted Danson and Shelley Long star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, causing Ray to wonder whether he is trying to avoid something. Determined to discover the truth, he deprives the youngster of television, comics and video games to sweat the answer out of him through sheer boredom

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray grow irritated by Robert and Amy's over-the-top displays of affection - especially when the pair start giving them relationship advice. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Gianni is hired to do some work on the kitchen, but infuriates Debra with his laziness. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Jon Manfrellotti and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink goes all out to win when he and Roz are nominated for a radio award, but wishes he hadn't after he discovers he is up against a veteran talk-show host who is retiring. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is furious to learn Frasier has thrown out his favourite chair to make space for a new one, and sends him out to retrieve it. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the advancing years begin to take their toll on Frasier, he wonders whether a relationship with a 20-year-old sales assistant would help him recapture some of his youthful vitality. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie prepares to end the year in style by throwing a Christmas dinner to remember. However, with the ancient range cooker out of action and the 19th-century bread oven put into service cooking the turkey, it's a tall order to deliver a five-course extravaganza for 17 guests. Angel sets Dick the task of finding and chopping the perfect logs for her Christmas table display in their 12-acre grounds. Christmas cheer threatens to run dry for south Londoners Lee and Belinda as freezing temperatures and a broken boiler put their first ever festive event in peril

programme.desc: Couples try to outdo one another by throwing the perfect dinner party in Co Antrim. Finishing off the week are smallholders Mandy and Jim, who serve up a Filipino roast pig dish followed by baked Alaska

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

However, hiding in each list of answers are wickedly deceptive and entirely plausible 'Answer Traps'. The first contestants are a brother and sister from West Yorkshire and an engaged couple from Glasgow

programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps a retired couple from Croydon find a second home in Valencia for £180,000, where they hope to be able to spend up to six months at a time

programme.desc: With debate raging over how some members of the royal family earn a private income, Dispatches goes undercover to find out what some of the Queen's family might be prepared to do for money. Reporter Antony Barnett finds that one royal offers the use of Kensington Place to an overseas gold company, and privileged access to Russian president Vladimir Putin

programme.title: How to Save a Grand in 24 Hours
programme.desc: Anna Richardson and the team delivers financial home truths to a self-employed couple from Portsmouth, who have found themselves reduced to a single income following the birth of their second child. Eve Humphreys provides some low-cost DIY tips, while Gary Usher shows them how to make their favourite takeaway at home for a fraction of the cost

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: An unborn baby has a large cyst on its neck that may prevent it from breathing on its own once born - requiring a procedure which has never been performed in the UK before. Other patients include a woman expecting twins who must choose whether to end the life of one foetus to save the other, and a 22-year-old woman who has become spontaneously pregnant with triplets and faces motherhood alone

programme.title: Jabbed! Inside Britain's Vaccine Triumph
programme.desc: Documentary about the team responsible for sourcing Covid-19 vaccines for the UK Government, whose efforts were one of the biggest public health gambles in British history. Members of the team share their experiences of the critical six-month period from May to December in 2020, where millions of pounds were spent on vaccines before anyone knew for certain if they actually worked

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to an emergency where a three-month-old baby has stopped breathing and is unconscious. The paramedics attend a road traffic collision involving a quad biker. In Bromsgrove, the fall of an elderly woman becomes life threatening as paramedics suspect she is suffering a stroke and they need to get her to hospital fast

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: As the UK enters its fourth week of lockdown, West Midlands Ambulance Service comes to the aid of the staff of care homes, who are feeling forgotten as the virus claims the lives of so many residents. It falls on crews like Julie and Adam to provide help and reassurance. Back in the control centre, Irum has had fast-track training and is plunged into the stark realities of her new role, while a national minute's silence for NHS and care workers holds a particular significance for her

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In west London, Daniela and Stuart kick off the culinary competition by serving an Italian menu, but they soon discover Manisha, with husband Akshay in tow, is hard to please. programme.title: The Money Maker

The Italian road trip takes in a holiday lodge made almost entirely from glass in the Dolomites

programme.desc: Sam joins Coach at night school to get his diploma - and soon arouses Diane's suspicions when he begins to do unusually well. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Nicholas Colasanto

programme.title: Cheers

programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier decide to collaborate on a self-help book about sibling relationships. After struggling to write it they lock themselves in a hotel room until it is finished, but petty jealousy reigns and the Crane brothers are soon at each other's throats

programme.desc: Food critic Gil takes over the radio show to cover for an ailing Frasier - who immediately fears his job is under threat and resolves to get back on air without delay. Comedy, starring Edward Hibbert and Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richard's son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

He begins with 1981, when Prince Charles married Lady Diana Spencer, aerobics fever took over with Olivia Newton John's Physical, the Specials captured the mood of the nation with Ghost Town following race riots across the country and the UK even won Eurovision thanks to Bucks Fizz

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Mysterious Worlds
programme.desc: The latest scientific theories are put to the test in the Bermuda Triangle, the stretch of the Atlantic Ocean in which a number of aircraft and sea vessels have vanished

programme.title: Caravanning with Shane Richie
programme.desc: The Isle of Wight is where Shane holidayed as a child, and where he began his career, staying in a unique, rock 'n' roll-themed caravan complete with its own hot tub. On his first day, Shane revisits his past with a visit to the pier at Sandown, where he did his earliest professional performances. Back at the holiday park, Shane enjoys an evening at the park's outdoor cinema, meeting both the holidaymakers who have come along and the staff keeping them entertained. He is later joined by TV chef Tony Tobin to forage along the shoreline for edible seaweed

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: DJ Jason Fubar is hanging up his headphones to overhaul a bar on Blackpool prom, but his tight £10,000 budget means calling in favours and doing lots of the work himself. In Skegness, 1960s-themed B&B owner Lorraine's hopes of impressing first-time visitors from Filey hang in the balance when her matching linen is stolen

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer returns to embark on more voyages around the world, beginning with the first of two programmes charting a trip to the Caribbean aboard a new luxury liner. The first leg takes her south-east from Fort Lauderdale in Florida toward the private resort of Princess Cays on the island of Eleuthera, and from there she continues along to the Virgin Isles and St Thomas, ending on the island of St Martin

programme.title: Gibraltar: Britain in the Sun
programme.desc: An ambulance crew from the British Overseas Territory's only hospital is called out to help a tourist in distress and an expat in trouble at the frontier with Spain. The annual race for boats made entirely out of cardboard takes place, while there is a demonstration of the extreme and dangerous sport of spearfishing by a group of experts. Elsewhere, members of a historical re-enactment society get kitted out in their finest attire to fire their big guns at the national stadium

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: Jackie Brambles narrates this look back at 1989, the era of Madonna, Milli Vanilli and Jason Donovan. programme.title: Wonderful World of Chocolate

Together they try out a few aids designed to prevent their night-time noise. Meanwhile, Eamonn and fellow insomniac Sam work out a sleep programme that focuses on establishing a set routine

programme.desc: Single mother Andrea lives in a two-bedroom flat in Lambeth with her three daughters. Over in Chelsea, best friends Geeta and Harriet share a love of the finer things in life - including Geeta's £7million four-storey townhouse. The divorced businesswoman runs a diet clinic and practises what she preaches, with a strict routine of yoga and exercise. How will Andrea, who lives on benefits, find the extravagance of Chelsea living? And how will Geeta and Harriet cope with a quieter life in much more cramped conditions?

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The story of 16-year-old Mithun Chauhan, who suffers from an extremely rare genetic condition that has left him with large swollen lumps all over his face and body. His disfigurement has led to the creation of a rumour that his village has become home to a reclusive monster. The condition, known as neurofibroma, affects one in 33,000 people and causes tumours to grow along the nerve endings, with Mithun's case among the most extreme ever discovered

Sidney continues training his sheepdog Nell, while Violet tends to nine-month-old calf Ciara, an animal she has hand-reared after its mother suffered an udder infection

Issues arise with custom-made furniture for the ship's biggest suites, and the arrival of the replacement pieces disrupts a promotional photo shoot

programme.desc: In the Arctic Circle, the explorer meets Randi, the first Norwegian woman to climb Everest ahead of his own bid to scale the world's highest mountain. He embraces the tough and basic life on her 8.5 acre island by sleeping outdoors, and collecting raw building materials. Ben also experiences sea kayaking, and witnesses the northern lights

programme.desc: A collection of internet-sourced videos, including what happens when grandma finds the webcam and an odd-looking cow. Plus, babies galore and slow-motion theatre

programme.desc: Hazel Taylor takes a frustrating walk in the countryside with Simon Cowell - who must then confront his fear of snakes to rescue one from a garden. The list of mouths to feed increases when some baby hedgehogs arrive at the centre, and a large swan causes a stir

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Cambridge art historian Paul Binski explores approaches to religious architecture, comparing Canterbury Cathedral's 12th-century stained-glass windows with those of York Minster, which were created only 100 years later, yet reflect a very different view of man's relationship with God

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: An imposing five-bedroom Victorian villa in Stoke-on-Trent has been on the market for two years. Ann Maurice discovers a potentially light and airy family home obscured by piles of clutter, and sets about restoring the house to its original splendour with neutral walls and fresh carpets

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)
programme.desc: Martial arts master panda Po continues to hone his skills when an evil peacock, who was banished from China for trying to build a deadly new weapon, returns to cause more chaos. It falls to Po to defeat him, but he suffers strange flashbacks revealing a connection between his past and the sinister bird. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Masters of the Universe (1987)
programme.desc: The heroic warrior He-Man sets out to bring an end to the evil Skeletor's reign of terror, but is transported to Earth by a cosmic key, with his arch enemy's henchman in hot pursuit. Fantasy adventure, starring Dolph Lundgren, Frank Langella, Meg Foster and Billy Barty

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout Interview Special
programme.desc: Stars Tom Cruise, Rebecca Ferguson, Henry Cavill, Simon Pegg, Vanessa Kirby and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about making the sixth instalment in the franchise

programme.title: Hail, Caesar! (2016)
programme.desc: An executive in 1950s Hollywood is employed to bury scandals, solve problems and ensure everything goes to plan for the studio. In one fraught day, he has to contend with the kidnapping of the leading man from the set of an ancient Roman epic, a musical star's secret pregnancy, and a director who objects to having a miscast actor forced on him. The Coen brothers' comedy, starring Josh Brolin, George Clooney, Scarlett Johansson and Ralph Fiennes

programme.title: Daddy's Home (2015)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered man hopes for his wife's two children to view him as their father. His dreams of perfect family life are threatened by the return of their biological father, a charismatic, motorcycle-riding tough guy, and he pulls out all the stops to prove to his stepchildren that he can be just as cool. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Black Sea (2014)
programme.desc: A submarine captain working for a salvage company is laid off, and attempts to turn his fortunes around by recovering a lost treasure rumoured to have sunk to the depths of the Black Sea. However, greed, desperation and claustrophobia cause the members of his crew to turn against each other. Thriller, starring Jude Law and Jodie Whittaker

programme.title: The Brand New Testament (2015)
programme.desc: God secretly lives in Brussels, spending his time enacting spiteful punishments on the human race. His rebellious daughter tries to teach him a lesson by sending everyone on Earth a message containing the date of their death. As the world is plunged into chaos, she flees from her furious father - who gains a new insight into his creation. Comedy, starring Pili Groyne, Benoit Poelvoorde and Catherine Deneuve. In French and German

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: Millions Like Us (1943)
programme.desc: A woman is happy to be called up for service during the Second World War, but disappointed to learn she will be working in a factory making aircraft parts. However, the new job brings romance in the shape of a handsome airman and a close circle of friends in her co-workers, who all rally round when tragedy strikes. Drama, starring Patricia Roc, Eric Portman, Gordon Jackson and Basil Radford

programme.title: Ministry of Fear (1944)
programme.desc: An innocent man recently released from a mental hospital inadvertently takes possession of a piece of microfilm meant for a Nazi agent, and finds himself on the run from both the police and the Nazis. Spy thriller based on Graham Greene's novel, starring Ray Milland, Marjorie Reynolds, Carl Esmond and Hillary Brooke

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom (1957)
programme.desc: A man who has only six months to live returns to the land his family owns in the Canadian Rockies. He intends to prove his grandfather's frequently derided theory that there is oil to be found there, but he has little time to find it, as the area will be flooded when construction is completed on a nearby dam. Adventure, with Dirk Bogarde, Stanley Baker, Michael Craig and Barbara Murray

programme.title: The Colditz Story (1954)
programme.desc: A medieval castle in Germany is turned into a PoW camp during the Second World War, and used to house the most rebellious Allied prisoners, all of whom have made repeated escape attempts. Although breaking out is supposedly impossible, the determined inmates refuse to be beaten and continue their bid for freedom. Second World War drama, starring John Mills and Eric Portman

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Capernaum (2018)
programme.desc: In Beirut, Zain is a young boy of uncertain age who is in prison for stabbing someone. He is also suing his parents for neglect. Writer/director Nadine Labaki's Cannes Jury prize-winning, Oscar-nominated drama, starring Zain Al Rafeea. In Arabic and Amharic, with English subtitles

programme.title: In Fear (2013)
programme.desc: A couple go to Ireland for a music festival, but get hopelessly lost when driving through a series of country roads. Their plight turns deadly as they are terrorised by mysterious figures lurking in the darkness, while an encounter with a seemingly harmless local brings dangers of its own. Horror, starring Iain De Caestecker, Alice Englert and Allen Leech

programme.title: Destry Rides Again (1939)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered sheriff is assigned to clean up a lawless town ruled over by a ruthless gangster - but finds his biggest problem is a sultry saloon singer determined to exact revenge on him for resisting her charms. Comedy Western, starring James Stewart, Marlene Dietrich, Charles Winninger, Mischa Auer and Brian Donlevy

programme.title: Santa Fe Passage (1955)
programme.desc: A wagon scout accused of collusion with Apaches is given a chance to redeem himself when he is hired to transport a shipment of arms to Santa Fe. The owner of the valuable freight happens to be a mixed-race woman and at first he shows her only disrespect, but has to overcome his prejudice when he finds himself falling for her. Western adventure, with John Payne, Faith Domergue and Slim Pickens

programme.title: The League of Gentlemen (1960)
programme.desc: A former Army colonel, angry at his enforced retirement, sets out to exact an elaborate revenge on society in general. Recruiting seven other former servicemen who have turned to a life of crime, he plans a major bank robbery with military precision. Crime caper, starring Jack Hawkins, Nigel Patrick, Richard Attenborough, Roger Livesey and Bryan Forbes

programme.title: Dark Command (1940)
programme.desc: A teacher is defeated in his ambition to become the marshal of his town during the early years of the American Civil War, so he turns renegade instead. Before long he has a reputation as a feared raider fighting on the side of the South, and it falls to the newly appointed lawman whose job he coveted to stop his reign of terror. Western, starring John Wayne and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: Transcendence (2014)
programme.desc: A scientist working to develop artificial intelligence is assassinated, but his death provides the breakthrough he and his colleagues needed, as his own mind is uploaded into a computer system. Granted extraordinary knowledge, he begins planning to change the world for the better - with potentially horrific consequences for the human race. Sci-fi drama, starring Johnny Depp, Rebecca Hall and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout (2018)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster caused by mysterious arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles. However, Hunt and his colleagues are soon pushed to their limits thanks to a face from their past. Writer/director Christopher McQuarrie's sixth entry in the action thriller saga, starring Tom Cruise and Henry Cavill

programme.title: Babylon AD (2008)
programme.desc: A mercenary in a post-apocalyptic future accepts a job escorting a mysterious girl and the nun protecting her from Russia to New York. Along the way, she exhibits strange powers that could hold the key to mankind's salvation - but various factions are plotting to put her gifts to their own use. Sci-fi adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Michelle Yeoh, Melanie Thierry, Gerard Depardieu and Charlotte Rampling

programme.title: Wild (2014)
programme.desc: A series of devastating personal traumas leaves a woman feeling self-destructive and lost. After spending years behaving recklessly, she decides to turn things around by embarking on an epic, solo trek along America's Pacific Crest Trail, which gives her the time and space to reassess her existence. Drama based on a true story, starring Reese Witherspoon and Laura Dern

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Supernanny US

Now the children are ruling the roost amid all the confusion and the parents are at their wits end. Can child-rearing expert Jo Frost help these young parents establish boundaries and respect within the household?

programme.title: Supernanny US

programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during March 2020, turning their attention to shows including Dragons' Den, Crufts and Antiques Roadshow. ITV drama Liar, Netflix's The Stranger and Channel 4's new dating show Five Guys a Week come under scrutiny, while news coverage of Harry and Meghan and the coronavirus are also appraised

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: askmaster Greg Davies and his miniature sidekick Alex Horne put contestants Iain Stirling, Joe Thomas, Lou Sanders, Paul Sinha and Sian Gibson through their paces. This edition features baby monitors, powerful smells and seductive dummies

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Annie, 37, has not had a relationship in a long time and is a bag of nerves as she waits to have dinner with builder Barry, who is three years her senior. However, she is also is struggling with a bigger issue and worries it's a deal-breaker. Kevin, 67, is in the drainage business and brings his unique blend of diamond in the rough and Essex boy charm to his date with receptionist Meguel

programme.title: Lego Masters USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are given the challenge of making a Lego city block that will be brought together as a huge city at the end of the episode

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder is upset when he discovers his friends have deleted him from their profiles on social media websites, and Lennox is determined to beat Zander's test scores. Meanwhile, Joe begins to date Mel's high-maintenance friend Anita (Shannon Elizabeth). Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel desperately tries to act like a cool aunt after discovering that Lennox and Zander have taken their relationship to the next level, but Joe just wants to kill the boyfriend. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Keira is impressed by his undeserved bad boy reputation, but her parents are not. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home, whilethe kids try to extend Lowell's stay after realising he is an amazing cook

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam convinces Teddy to fight a kid who is bullying Emme, but Andi does not approve. Joe hires a nurse to help him recover from his knee surgery

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben poses as Brad, Bonnie's absent husband, when her friends from work refuse to believe she has an attractive, younger partner. When Danny begins dating a beautiful actress as a publicity stunt, Riley decides to go back out with Ross to make Danny jealous. Tucker tries to further his career as an entertainment reporter by getting the real scoop on Danny and his 'new girlfriend'

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The presenter looks back at some of his favourite builds by the sea, including a multifunctional beach hut in Bournemouth, Dorset, built for less than £400, and a 21st-century update of a Victorian bathing machine in Margate, Kent. George also looks back at some of his favourite waterside retreats in Germany - an extraordinary life guard tower and a holiday home with incredible views across the water - as well as reflecting on the seaside build he undertook with master craftsman Will Hardie that pushed the humble beach hut to its limits by making it float in the open sea

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Back in 2017, George drafted in architect Chris Mason to help Wendy and Allan, whose Colchester home resembled a block of flats. They ended up with an enormous double-height extension and a Roman-style portico, but the ambitious scheme blew their budget and the project remained unfinished. George returns to find out whether they have managed to finish the property to the same exceptional standards

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George travels to Margate, where Joanna and Simon have bought themselves a large Victorian semi-detached house, only to become overwhelmed by the refurbishment task ahead. He also visits a grand Georgian manor built in 1820 and frequented by King Edward VII. The Worthing property was divided into flats in the 1980s and it is in one of these that owners Charlie and Julie are wrestling with how to turn a big Regency reception room into contemporary living and dining space

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nursing manager Sarah hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Leeds, taking inspiration from her husband's Middle Eastern heritage to offer her guests a Turkish fusion menu. Joining her is 28-year-old painter decorator Alex, 45-year-old bridal shop owner Abbi, 60-year-old community centre manager Janet and 56-year-old record label boss Phil. A hilarious evening lies in store, with unexpected tattoos, beauty tips and twerking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Would-be clairvoyant Janet hosts the second of a week of dinner parties in Leeds and hopes her ghoul-themed dinner party will help her win the cash prize. Part of Janet's plan is to pretend her house is haunted and she has a practical joke lined up for nursing manager Sarah and bridal shop owner Abbi to find. With more surprises in store, will the fright-night theme be enough to ghost Janet into the lead?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Record label owner Phil hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Leeds, hoping to win the £1,000 prize money by serving up a 1970s rock-themed menu. His guests are astounded by his mystery past, and painter and decorator Alex is unimpressed when wedding shop owner Abbi continues to wind him up

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Painter and decorator Alex hosts the fourth night in Leeds, hoping to win the prize money by serving up a cruise-themed menu from around the world - which impresses jealous rival Janet so much, she almost turns violent. Abbi continues to belittle the host - until he reveals he spends his evenings on stage impersonating a famous heart-throb singer. Will his performance bag him the top prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bridal shop owner Abbi hopes to woo her guests with a wedding-themed party on the final day of the competition in Leeds. All week Abbi and Michael Buble impersonator Alex have had a bit of a banter that has sailed close to the wind. Will the tension take over, or can the wedding theme create an amorous atmosphere that will help Abbi win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the African-themed Foxholm B&B in North Yorkshire begins another competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey initially impress their guests with a cupcake class, but tempers fray when John Shields makes an unfavourable remark about German-born Sigrid

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rival hoteliers to the Pack Horse, an American diner-themed B&B in Lincolnshire, for the second round of the competition. A horse-riding session turns sour when Steve Reed takes a dislike to Nick Lawler, and matters get worse over dinner - before a pancake shortage at breakfast causes problems for the hosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Sigrid Reed host at their Glenwalden B&B in Blackpool. They hope ballroom dancing will entertain the guests, some of whom object to the pink flock wallpaper and knitted toilet roll holders. Nick Lawler seems to be warming to the owners, but one of them suspects his change of heart is all part of a cunning plan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Lawler and business partner Kate Wilson host the competition at the Winder Hall Country House B&B in the Lake District, but a clash of egos ensues when they try to lecture the other participants about how to manage their hospitality establishments, and a disastrous breakfast service leaves contestants unimpressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Kent, 51-year-old construction site manager and part-time bouncer Mark hopes that his dinner party can be as much about the party as it is about the dinner, as he hosts a cheesy fun-fuelled evening. Will party poppers, balloons, confetti cannons and surprising celebrity stories impress 53-year-old dog-lover Karen, 39-year-old Czech shop assistant Verush, 42-year-old singer Amrick and 58-year-old fashion photographer Anthony?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in Kent, competitive sales assistant Verush is going all out to win by hosting a Czech-themed evening, but ex-stripper Mark isn't impressed, comparing Verush's pasta to MDF and pastry to leather, while the first night's argument between dog lover Karen and photographer Anthony is reignited

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog enthusiast Karen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Kent, hoping to impress her guests by serving up a menu inspired by her four-legged friends. After the cheesy fun of the previous night, she is determined to impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amrick takes his turn to host in Kent, hoping to wow his guests by revealing his musical talents and with his traditional Indian cuisine. But with dog-lover Karen and competitive Verush not liking hot and spicy food, there could be trouble - while photographer Anthony questions ex-stripper Mark's dress sense

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Anthony attempts to wow his guests with an evening of fine food and culinary excellence on the final day of the competition in Kent. However, the soiree is jeopardised by ex-stripper Mark on overdrive and dog-lover Karen showcasing some incredible impressions from animals to Anthony himself. The host might be cockily confident he can win, but Karen seemingly remains in pole position to bag the £1,000 prize

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman collapses in the street while out shopping and may have broken her hip, while a man threatens to take an overdose if the paramedics do not take him to hospital

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on how young males can lead each other into criminality, and how what may start as youthful pranks can easily progress to committing offences. Officers from South Yorkshire police investigate a report of youths breaking into a pub in broad daylight, and apprehend a group of 15-year-olds detained on suspicion of burglary

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, cyclist Matt suffers life-threatening injuries after a collision with a car, while in Cumbria, heli-medics fly to help Caroline, who has come off a motorbike

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman collapses in the street while out shopping and may have broken her hip, while a man threatens to take an overdose if the paramedics do not take him to hospital

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on how young males can lead each other into criminality, and how what may start as youthful pranks can easily progress to committing offences. Officers from South Yorkshire police investigate a report of youths breaking into a pub in broad daylight, and apprehend a group of 15-year-olds detained on suspicion of burglary

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp teams up with potter Richard Miller to help Ellie and Nick Harrington - who have no practical DIY skills - create plates to complement their 1930s-style dining room in Tunbridge Wells, Kent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Wendy Tyler has long dreamed of living in Spain and recently found a job in Benidorm. Danni Menzies shows Wendy and her best friend Diana five properties for her budget of £70,000, but it remains to be seen which she will consider to be the final piece of the jigsaw

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more gems hidden among unwanted possessions, trying to make a profit from church organ pipes and old leather sports car seats

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole calls in a locksmith to bring a safe back from the scrapheap, and a ship's wheel is left in splinters when the presenter falls out with restorer Guy

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives search for the relatives of a popular Manchester man who has left behind a £20,000 estate, but have their work cut out when they discover part of his family emigrated to the other side of the world. Plus, a newly advertised unclaimed property causes problems for the team

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A husband and wife face long delays as they race to open a top-class seafood restaurant in Spain, while a couple from London escape the rat race with dreams of setting up a B&B in rural France. Plus, can a traditional pub on the Costa del Sol pull in the punters during the busy summer season?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Who'd a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where partners Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin hope to impress their fellow guests. On arrival, Liz and Brian are excited over their two hot tubs, and Jackie and Paul are more than happy with the complimentary champagne. However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. However, Jackie and Paul are unimpressed by their small room, and Joe and Alex find the cleanliness levels lacking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where B&B newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. They take their guests to a local maze in the afternoon and, after an uncomfortable night's sleep for Alex, some of the breakfast orders are misplaced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine welcome their guests to The Great Trewern B&B, Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where they enjoy the quiet life. Joe and Alex feel far away from it all, but the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress the other guests. At dinner, talk turns to first impressions and it appears it is all water under the bridge for Jackie and Joe, but she remains upset with the feedback Matthew and Liam gave her

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one final time to find out what they have been paid. Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin kick things off by confronting Matthew Bracegirdle and Liam Halewood about their comments regarding the cleanliness of their establishment, and Jackie and Paul Langshaw complain about their poor breakfast score

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers take on the challenging task of finding the heir to a £200,000 fortune, and unearth the story of a tragic accident on the London, Midland and Scottish Railways in the process. Plus, a surprising family secret is uncovered in a case that took a team almost 20 years to solve

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's nightfall at Chester and the zoo's 800 nocturnal inhabitants start to wake up. Aardvark Koos is showing a potentially romantic interest in his sister Himba, but the zoo needs to ensure that their animals are breeding from the right genetic pool. It's also time for mouse-deer Una to leave her parents and meet a mate

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After a four year stint living in New Zealand, ex-RAF pilot Jon and GP Gill Flewers want to build a Kiwi-style hill house on the slopes of the Malvern hills in Worcestershire. They plan to build an ambitious three-storey home clad in wood and stone, but the pair encounter problems as the site is so steep builders do not want to take on the job

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The stories behind two sunken ocean liners a century apart - the Empress of Ireland, which sank in heavy fog in 1914, and El Faro, which was struck by a tropical storm in 2015

programme.title: Ghosts of the Deep: Ancient Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following scientists on a quest to find out how the Black Sea changed from a freshwater lake to a sea at the end of the last Ice Age

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An 18-year-old is rushed in after breaking his leg while playing football, and doctors worry it may have long-term implications. Meanwhile, David, who is 29, is airlifted to St George's following a head-on collision at speed, and 94-year-old Mary arrives after falling backwards down 14 steps and losing consciousness

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Vic Reeves and Sara Pascoe joining team captains Sean Lock and Lee Mack. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Countdown regular Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley provides the numbers and letters

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The stories behind two sunken ocean liners a century apart - the Empress of Ireland, which sank in heavy fog in 1914, and El Faro, which was struck by a tropical storm in 2015

programme.title: Ghosts of the Deep: Ancient Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following scientists on a quest to find out how the Black Sea changed from a freshwater lake to a sea at the end of the last Ice Age

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt investigates concerns about levels of naturally occurring arsenic in baby rice products, Jimmy Doherty examines Marks & Spencer's claim that they can trace all their beefburgers back to the cow, and Kate Quilton find out whether a parasite could be hiding in sushi. Programme exploring the secrets behind mass-produced food, meeting technicians, scientists, factory owners, growers and producers to find out exactly what goes into the groceries that end up on the supermarket shelves

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jannine and Shaun Cartwright build treasure chests for their young boys' toys with help from furniture-maker Anselm Fraser

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lea and Tony Desborough from Essex have fallen in love with Menorca on countless holidays over the last 20 years, and have dreamed of owning their own place there. Now, as they wind down their work commitments, they've decided it's time to make that dream a reality. Laura Hamilton shows them five coastal villas for their £250,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up, flog on and sell for profit. Max upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives are called in by a solicitor to help track down the beneficiaries to a £300,000 estate left by a former merchant seaman, and while looking for the relatives of an actress, they unearth the story of a couple who made front-page news when they eloped

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: After weeks of delays, a couple of expats aim to open their seafood restaurant without any further hitches, engine trouble threatens to end a French dream before it even begins and Spain's newest bar tries to win over the tourists with live music

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The detectives search for the relatives of a well-liked Essex woman without knowing the value of her estate, and hope that their gamble will pay off when the amount is revealed . Plus, a case from the archives telling the story of one family's escape from war-torn Burma, and details of unclaimed estates

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Orang-utan sisters Emma and Subis are due to give birth at the same time, but after being in labour for more than 24 hours with no progress, Subis is rushed to the vet for a possible C-section. Meerkats Beagle and Huskie have moved to the zoo as the new breeding pair, but their new housemates, the aardvarks, are making them anxious. In an effort to make them more comfortable in their new home, the team decide to redesign the paddock to give the meerkats their own space

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some Vitrolite vintage tiles for an art deco bathroom - but it proves harder than they expected. Some lime plastering back at Paul's chateau requires a search for some horse hair from a local stables. Abbie is busy painting furniture for bedrooms, and mum Karen has problems with their swimming pool, the fire extinguishers certifications all need renewing, and with a big wedding party arriving soon, the to-do list just keeps getting longer

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets neurologists Penny Talelli and Mark Edwards, who plan to combine their love of old and contemporary architecture as they transform a derelict Victorian gatehouse in north London. However, the pair soon find themselves struggling to balance their busy working lives alongside project managing the build

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Scotland to take on a 1968 Lancia Fulvia - a 1960s Italian automotive masterpiece. The car belongs to former hairdresser Bill, who bought it back in 1984. It was his pride and joy until it went off the road a few years back

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from the pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab, with access-all-areas footage of each stage of the 28-hour production process

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Billy is rushed to St George's after being crushed by falling bricks that were being stored on his front drive, while six-year-old Luther has a metal washer stuck on his finger. Senior healthcare play specialist Tracy talks about her job, which is to comfort and distract children during their treatment in A&E, and 83-year-old Audrey arrives with her grandson Lee after damaging her wrist while falling on holiday

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with regular Sean Lock and guest captain Sarah Millican joined by Bob Mortimer and Katherine Ryan. Alex Horne and the Horne Section preside alongside Countdown regular Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: How to Build

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Sri Lanka to reveal the extraordinary lengths to which manufacturers go in order to split red lentils, and asks why they bother with this process. Kate Quilton learns why the way tea is drunk can affect its taste, and Matt Tebbutt finds out the difference between bubblegum and chewing gum

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Brojects in the House
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and Kevin turn traditional home and cottage renovation projects on their head

programme.title: Brojects in the House
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and Kevin turn traditional home and cottage renovation projects on their head

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys do a favour for a friend, although what at first seems like a raw deal becomes a surprising win-win situation

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: As auctioneer Sean Kelly and the team arrive in Gwent, Heavy D confuses the other bidders and himself. Meanwhile, Nat takes a gamble, but John is far from happy

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees UK bidders battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages in Leeds

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Rival teams of amateur racers pit their wacky, gravity-powered soapbox vehicles in a downhill race against the clock in Paris

programme.title: Fast Justice
programme.desc: The Sentinels launch a daring operation to bring a car to a stop on the busy A12 and a Chinese food delivery driver isn't happy to discover he's driving illegally

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compare the Mercedes SLS, the Porsche 911 GT3 RS and the Ferrari 458 Italia, as they race against each other in an epic road trip up America's east coast

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall, winner of the 2017 World's Strongest Man contest, tours the USA on a quest to conquer the biggest and best eye-watering food and physical challenges. Eddie lands in Florida Keys to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Comedian and actor Miles Jupp, chef extraordinaire Heston Blumenthal, actress Emilia Fox and funnyman Ed Byrne are this week's guests

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs try to call each other's bluff with a few stories about themselves that may be the truth or may be out-and-out porkies. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are comedians Rhod Gilbert and Hal Cruttenden, interior designer and former Dragons' Den investor Kelly Hoppen and TV host and number-cruncher Carol Vorderman

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs divulge what sound like tall tales about themselves, before their rival contestants decide whether they are lying. Greg Davies takes Lee Mack's place as guest captain, and joining him and David Mitchell are choir leader Gareth Malone, Sherlock actress Amanda Abbington, comedian and Buzzcocks panellist Phill Jupitus and Pointless co-host Richard Osman

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harmin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Sue and David Sherlock from Stockport. The couple want a fresh start with their daughter, but cannot decide where to start their new adventure. David is championing the Lake District, close to his three grown-up daughters, but Sue wants a complete change and thinks their future lies in the Dordogne region of France. Jasmine is given a UK budget of £730,000, but it's going to be close as Laura tries to entice them across the Channel with three attractive properties in France worth up to £500,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Debbie and John go looking for a new life and home on the Costa del Sol with help from Jean Johansson, who lines up five potential properties for their £250,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Professional deep-sea diver Adrian Corrigall and his wife Megan plan to build their new family home in rural East Sussex almost entirely out of concrete, with construction involving cutting-edge technologies conceived in Switzerland and never used to build a house before. However, the perils of being a pioneer soon become evident, and with both schedule and budget under strain, Adrian is forced to resume work as a diver, taking him away from the project for a month at a time

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes the oldest ever picker to the studio, 75-year-old naturist Ian from North Yorkshire. Ian has recently been exploring his sexuality and needs help to find his perfect partner. Next up is 30-year-old waitress Kerry from Aberdeen, who finds the smell of men's armpits gets her hot under the collar and wants a man with a sweet scent who can also get experimental in the bedroom

programme.title: First Dates Hotel

Meanwhile, Darill quickly learns there are certain things you should keep to yourself when he sits down with single mum Millie. Other pairings include part-time actor Simon and Disney-loving fellow thespian James, and 83-year-old former jazz singer Dorit and 82-year-old poetry lover John

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: Glamping is on the rise in Britain, and it's no longer just a posh tent in a field. Up and down the country people are repurposing old vehicles into boutique hotels - and now, there's a new kid in town. This documentary follows comedian Johnny Vegas and his assistant Bev see through their plans to create the county's coolest glamping site. Johnny is starting by buying a vintage bus he has seen online, hoping to renovate it and put it in a field as part of his new project. The only problem is, the vehicle is in Malta, so he will need a plane to collect it

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

Kirstie Allsopp is with single mum and businesswoman Digi, who has £1.25million to find the perfect place for her, daughter Emily and mum Queelan. However, it soon proves a challenge to find the family home that suits all their needs. Phil Spencer helps Rebecca and Sohail, who have raised their family in rented accommodation and now want a place of their own now.
