The Peruvian-themed feast is followed by a rendition of the country's national anthem and a traditional dance involving a candle and a donkey's jaw

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the competition in Winchester, Georgia Groves plans a black-tie evening complete with a red carpet, posh frocks and a spray-tan booth. It appears to be going well until Patricia Pearson reveals what she thinks of Ptol Slattery and his wine antics

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent William Tilsley throws one last dinner party as a week of competitions in Winchester, Hampshire, draws to a close. The host plans to offer his guests a vegetarian menu, with a blind food-tasting game providing the evening's entertainment. As the night draws to a close, one of the competitors rises above the rest to become the winner

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca struggle to get their kilometre-long driveway ready for the arrival of their guests. Amy and Marc unearth an original medieval fireplace

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps a retired couple from Croydon find a second home in Valencia for £180,000, where they hope to be able to spend up to six months at a time

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: Glamping is on the rise in Britain, and it's no longer just a posh tent in a field. Up and down the country people are repurposing old vehicles into boutique hotels - and now, there's a new kid in town. This documentary follows comedian Johnny Vegas and his assistant Bev see through their plans to create the county's coolest glamping site. Johnny is starting by buying a vintage bus he has seen online, hoping to renovate it and put it in a field as part of his new project. The only problem is, the vehicle is in Malta, so he will need a plane to collect it

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Married couple Dexter and Aaron are looking for a fluffy, chunky dog. Ellie the chihuahua will have to prove that being neither fluffy or chunky isn't a problem when it comes to being their perfect match. Yoga teacher Venessa and son Jacob try to assess whether there is a bond between them and Zoe, a friendly beagle who has been trying to sniff out a new home for a while. Plus, Stanley the anxious Staffie meets 'dog-mad' pair Linda and Richard

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: An unborn baby has a large cyst on its neck that may prevent it from breathing on its own once born - requiring a procedure which has never been performed in the UK before. Other patients include a woman expecting twins who must choose whether to end the life of one foetus to save the other, and a 22-year-old woman who has become spontaneously pregnant with triplets and faces motherhood alone

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: A look back at some of the most memorable dates and other moments from the First Dates Hotel, including the meeting between policewoman Emma and carpenter Luke, which promised to be one of the most passionate dates in the show's history. Meanwhile, Darill quickly learns there are certain things you should keep to yourself when he sits down with single mum Millie. Other pairings include part-time actor Simon and Disney-loving fellow thespian James, and 83-year-old former jazz singer Dorit and 82-year-old poetry lover John

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes the oldest ever picker to the studio, 75-year-old naturist Ian from North Yorkshire. Ian has recently been exploring his sexuality and needs help to find his perfect partner. Next up is 30-year-old waitress Kerry from Aberdeen, who finds the smell of men's armpits gets her hot under the collar and wants a man with a sweet scent who can also get experimental in the bedroom

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: When Frank discovers that Padraig has recruited Doofus to write songs for an am-dram performance of Twelve Angry Women: The Musical, he's resolves to share the limelight and muscle in on Doofus's set list. However, as opening night approaches, Frank's songs aren't getting the positive response he'd hoped for, while Doofus's material is going down a storm. Comedy, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: How to Save a Grand in 24 Hours
programme.desc: A couple from Solihull turn over their bank statements to Anna Richardson and the experts for some hard home truths about their spending since they were both put on furlough. They are shown some handy tips to save money on their utility bills and subscriptions, and are given a cheaper alternative to their love of takeaways in the shape of an affordable recipe for duck breasts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Victoria Inn in Witton-le-Wear, County Durham, where someone gets locked in a bathroom and bed springs leave one couple facing a battle

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival duos compete in Glasgow, where highlights include a bit of karaoke, a game of guess that tune and one menu inspired by moments in the couple's relationship

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh champion sausage-maker Steve and his wife Helen have travelled the world in search of the perfect holiday home and have decided that Torrox on the Costa del Sol is for them. Scarlette Douglas pulls out all the stops to show five properties within her budget of £95,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Surinder Bedi and her son Narinder find a holiday home for the whole family in the Murcia region on Spain's Mediterranean coast. With a cash budget of £70,000, Laura shows them a selection of property contenders that offer good value, but will they go for an apartment by the beach or a villa with a pool?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Chris and Dan Boettcher from Bedfordshire find a holiday home in the Axarquia region of Spain's Costa del Sol on their budget of £70,000. They view five properties, hoping one of them will be the retreat they can escape to with their family without too much prior planning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Clairvoyant Yvette Tamara hosts the first dinner party in north Kent, and the night gets off to a spooky start when data analyst John Tower and working mother Yemi Christopher-Soares discover a ghost-busting machine. Meanwhile, jeweller Lisa Townend is so impressed with Yvette's abilities that she wants to return for a psychic reading

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Data analyst John Tower hosts the second dinner party in north Kent, and lets his passion for military re-enactment show when he barks orders at the table. However, not all the guests enjoy his fatty pork stew and psychedelic dessert, and two argue over dating etiquette

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Project manager Yemi Christopher-Soares hosts the third dinner party in north Kent, where she hopes the guests will enjoy her Nigerian-inspired menu and appreciate her love of all things spicy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jono Simm hosts the penultimate dinner party in north Kent and is convinced his wholesome and hearty menu is the way to win. However, two of his guests are less than impressed by his cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Lisa Townend hosts the final dinner party in north Kent, and hopes that a menu full of French fancies and innovative entertainment in the form of human roulette, will be enough to impress her guests and see her crowned winner of the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca set to work renovating their kitchen, bBut with big dreams and a limited budget Rebecca visits Angel to see how far their money can stretch with a bit of creative know-how. Amy and Marc set themselves the unenviable task of transforming a bedroom with damaged floors, crumbling walls and a bathroom stuck in a '70s time-warp into a luxury B&B suite. Ben and Billie have it all to do as they aim to revamp an old outbuilding into a Moroccan oasis and illuminate the chateau with an architectural lighting display in preparation for Billie's brother's wedding

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Kathryn and Mark find a home on the Kassandra Peninsula in the north of Greece, with plenty of room for the family and near to the beach on a budget of £80,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps a retired couple from Croydon find a second home in Valencia for £180,000, where they hope to be able to spend up to six months at a time

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer return to find out how some of the families they have helped are getting on since they decided whether to redesign their problematic homes or sell up and move on. They begin with Paul and Dawn from the first edition back in April 2015, who were at loggerheads over what to do with their detached country home. Its isolated location on the outskirts of Huddersfield made it perfect for astronomy fanatic Paul, but Dawn was desperate to move, hating its dysfunctional layout

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 21 new recruits for the sixth series face an intense start when the train they are travelling on is the subject of a fake hijack to test the passengers' reactions. The trainees are then pitted them against each other in a race up a 4000ft mountain, followed by a 100ft abseil off an oil rig, as the team of instructors look for people who can handle anything that is thrown at them

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: As the UK enters its fourth week of lockdown, West Midlands Ambulance Service comes to the aid of the staff of care homes, who are feeling forgotten as the virus claims the lives of so many residents. It falls on crews like Julie and Adam to provide help and reassurance. Back in the control centre, Irum has had fast-track training and is plunged into the stark realities of her new role, while a national minute's silence for NHS and care workers holds a particular significance for her

programme.title: The Money Maker
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and investor Eric Collins heads to Sussex to visit an award-winning artisan bread company in the grip of the pandemic. Alex, CEO of the Sussex Kitchen, is losing customers and in danger of going bankrupt within a month. To make some much-needed dough, Eric has to convince Alex to pivot his business away from wholesale to focus on online customers. But he has his work cut out persuading the social media sceptic to change things round at the speed he demands

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 24-year-old Sian from Norfolk, a petrol head who wants to find a man she can love more than her beloved car, and 33-year-old fashion entrepreneur Tansel from London. He is looking to settle down and hopes that losing ignoring the clothes for once will help him find the right girl

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes the oldest ever picker to the studio, 75-year-old naturist Ian from North Yorkshire. Ian has recently been exploring his sexuality and needs help to find his perfect partner. Next up is 30-year-old waitress Kerry from Aberdeen, who finds the smell of men's armpits gets her hot under the collar and wants a man with a sweet scent who can also get experimental in the bedroom

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Two sets of house-hunters look for properties in north London. Kirstie Allsopp is with single mum and businesswoman Digi, who has £1.25million to find the perfect place for her, daughter Emily and mum Queelan. However, it soon proves a challenge to find the family home that suits all their needs. Phil Spencer helps Rebecca and Sohail, who have raised their family in rented accommodation and now want a place of their own now. The problem is finding a place they will love when their rental is worth at least £200,000 more than their budget to buy

programme.title: The Great Garden Revolution
programme.desc: The experts focus on wild gardens that celebrate nature. Poppy Okotcha creates a wild planting design that requires little maintenance, Joel Bird demonstrates how to make a living tipi, and Bruce Kenneth builds a table with its own herb patch and built-in bar. The team also visits a family in the Pennine hills looking for an outside space that goes with their view of the Saddleworth countryside

programme.title: Beat the Chef
programme.desc: Jaya Mistry spices up the competition, challenging chef Frederick Forster to her family Indian recipe to help her win the £10,000 prize. She's keen to curry favour with the food jury, but when it comes to baking chef's apple tart, there is a possibility her dreams of a win may crumble. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Celine, a 24-year-old globetrotter, experiences a holiday on a wet, Welsh campsite with all seven of the noisy Jarman family. Putting up her own tent is just one of the challenges she faces, along with feeding the whole family for the same price she would normally spend on a starter and a drink at her favourite restaurant

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Documenting the exploits of waste enforcers as they battle to keep Britain tidy. Featuring a tsunami of effluent in Hampshire, sewer safety and a wet wipe wild goose chase

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Special vigilante waste warriors Martin and Glenn opt for a stake out in their pursuit of a phantom fly-tipper terrorising their local neighbourhood

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Neil and Louise Brimicombe swap their three-bedroom house on a Watford estate to spend a week in the six-bedroom Chelmsford home of restaurateurs Steve and Jo Haslam - and vice versa - to see how the other half lives. The Brimicombes and their children will see their weekly budget increase from £140 to a massive £3,000, and will also enjoy nightly takeaways, three cars, regular pampering sessions and expensive shopping trips. Meanwhile, Jo is away on business so Steve will be left as a single parent - how will he cope given he has never even worked a washing machine?

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Gary have decided to change everything for a new life in Spain, arriving with just two suitcases, a hotel for a few nights and £3,500. But having never been to Benidorm before, could their dream turn into a nightmare? Scotsman Graham has hit upon the idea of selling organised pub crawls, while another Graham - the drivetime DJ at Fresh Radio - faces a dilemma when he is offered his old job back, which would mean spending less time with girlfriend Jackie

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Bar manager Chris and hairdresser Gary have only been in Benidorm a week, but they have already found the perfect apartment and are now looking for work. But Chris has something else on his mind, which involves asking his boyfriend a special question. The documentary also catches up with Linda, who runs a dog rescue charity, and introduces Bradford-born Chris, who has turned his love of buying-and-selling into opening an antique and second-hand furniture shop

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: The opening night of Dave and Tony's Mexican restaurant looks like being a washout when the rain pours down - and the weather doesn't exactly help mother-and-daughter bar owners Lisa and Tia when they advertise a Friday night barbecue. Dog rescuer Linda is worried about sick pup Donny, while Sheffield retirees Phil and Jackie - known for their colourful, matching outfits - scour the charity shops for more crazy clothing bargains

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A critically ill patient is brought into the emergency department after suffering a sudden cardiac arrest while in a local cafe with his wife. Meanwhile, doctor Bharath Reddy treats Maxine, who broke her wrist when she slipped de-icing the car, and another patient is treated after fracturing her shoulder

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: This time, paediatric sister Jemma Wray treats two critically ill children - 10-year-old Kai has been having seizures, and 18-month-old Joel is struggling to breathe. Elsewhere, nurse Will Gibbons looks after a 28-year-old patient who has been in a motorbike accident, and 51-year-old Andrew comes into the hospital after damaging his fingers with a circular saw

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: It is nurse Jade's final shift in Barnsley Hospital's casualty department and auxiliary nurse Mike is determined to give her a good send-off. In paediatrics, registrar Dr Nick Mani is seeing a nine-month-old boy who has a very high temperature, while physiotherapist Jovan helps a 90-year-old woman who banged her head in the hospital restaurant

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary filmed inside Barnsley casualty department. Paramedics call to say they are rushing in a critically ill one-day-old baby, a road worker is brought in after having his foot run over by a mini-digger and a woman seeks treatment following a surprising reaction to a beauty treatment. Sister Jane meets one of her heroes when Barnsley cricketing legend Dickie Bird arrives for a follow-up appointment

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary examining the murder of Janet Scott, who was killed by her partner, Simon Mellors, a man who had been hiding a dark and violent secret - he had spent the last 14 years in prison for the murder of his ex-partner. In the months leading up to her death, Simon showered Janet with gifts and attention, but their relationship drastically changed when Simon became increasingly controlling of who she saw, her home and her life. Feeling suffocated, Janet decided to end things, with fatal consequences

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The case of British serial killer Dennis Nilsen. The murderer's crimes were uncovered by a plumber who discovered human flesh in Nilsen's drains

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary examining the case against Luke Mitchell, who was accused of brutally murdering 14-year-old schoolgirl Jodi Jones in 2003. 17 years on from her murder, two former detectives who are now private investigators re-open the case files and re-examine the police and prosecution's case against Luke Mitchell, who continues to maintain his innocence to this day. Throughout the programme, the investigators uncover shocking details of other male DNA found at the crime scene, and disturbing new information from a witness living in the area at the time

programme.title: When Kids Kill
programme.desc: Cases where the killer argued that mental health issues drove them to murder, including a young man with ADHD who strangled Hannah Windsor to death in woodlands in Merseyside

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: From endless food and drink to hotels with kids' clubs and water parks, going all-inclusive is supposed to be all about hassle-free fun in the sun. But for some, this option proves anything but relaxing. Here cameras follow the unlucky holidaymakers whose breaks went horribly wrong. They include nurse Julia Vaughan, who spent more than £5,500 on a relaxing break in Crete for herself and her family, only to be confronted by a giant construction site next to their hotel

programme.title: All You Can Eat: Secrets of the World's Mega Buffet
programme.desc: The JRC Global Buffet in Watford is one of the biggest restaurants in the UK. Covering 27,000 square feet, and serving up to 350 dishes from all over the world, it can feed as many as 3,000 people every day. Cameras reveal how the company can feed people as much as they want for a set price and keep their business booming

programme.desc: Richard and Brennan help a woman who has not unpacked two years after moving into her first floor flat, and who struggles to give up things she does not need

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: One of the busiest weeks in the western network's calendar arrives as the Cheltenham Festival gets under way, with staff in Paddington preparing themselves for the thousands of extra passengers who will descend on the station to make the trip to Cheltenham Spa. In Swindon, incident controller Jason receives the alarming news that heavy rainfall in the south-west has prompted concerns about the real possibility of flooding at the crucial Cowley Bridge junction

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest homes. This episode features Lee, who lost control of his cleaning when he started a mental health network

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The police deal with a suicidal young man with mental health problems, an Eritrean woman dumped out of a lorry by people traffickers, and a local lass who has quarrelled with her two-timing boyfriend. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: This episode focuses on car thieves, with the hunt for a stolen Ford Fiesta in Leeds ending in a dramatic foot chase as officers pursue one of the mouthiest criminals they have ever encountered. On the other side of the city, two men steal two high-performance cars before leading the cops on one of the longest pursuits in the history of the force as they criss-cross the county for more than an hour, frequently at speeds in excess of 150mph

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Jon is forced to wrestle with a drunk man on the high street in Lincoln and Dan has an early morning encounter with a driver who is over the limit. Elsewhere, a wine-loving shoplifter gets his just desserts, Mark pulls over a juggernaut in jeopardy on the A1, and the helicopter is scrambled to chase down a car thief

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A violent man gives officers the runaround after wreaking havoc in a hospital, a Macedonian truck driver has a bad day and a fuel thief is caught red-handed. Meanwhile, two Audi S3s are put through their paces by the team and the Operational Support Unit goes back to the classroom for a course about dealing with riots

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sergeant Baxter strikes it lucky when a routine check on a car uncovers a case of suspected drug dealing, and things turn nasty when three men are arrested on suspicion of theft. Elsewhere, Jon Peacock brings in two prisoners, a petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt after a high-speed pursuit, and Jules and Jezz come to the aid of an abandoned dog in a ditch

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A 74-year-old with breathing difficulties is rushed into Barnsley Hospital, and registrar Dr Nick Mani considers placing the patient in a medically-induced coma to stabilise him. Junior doctor Ashleigh Trimble assesses 70-year-old Dave, whose daughter Sarah fears her dad's confusion and loss of appetite are masking a more serious condition

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Hendrix and Mackenzie almost kiss, and worry whether their friendship is ruined. Brent steals donated equipment for the Year 13 programme

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: A journalist is intrigued by John's involvement with the Surf Club. Willow waits for Alex to return her call. Lewis is furious that Christian is back at work

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Lincolnshire landowner Robert Elwes, his archaeologist wife Marina and daughter Emily swap homes, budgets and lives with West Yorkshire couple Siobhan and Andy Leckenby and their children Kacey-Leigh, Oscar and Poppy

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, Rachel and Chris are being given the run-around by their four dogs, so trainer Graeme Hall attempts to bring the chaotic canines to heel. Cameras also focus on a case in the Midlands, where police officer Simon is being held hostage in his own home by Spaniel Pointer Cross, Dotty

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: The heiress of a wealthy Nigerian family moves in with a couple and their daughter on a Doncaster council estate who are trying to scrape by on universal credit

programme.title: Princess Diana: In Her Own Words
programme.desc: Documentary charting Diana's royal journey, examining how she transformed herself from royal wife to global humanitarian. The programme features rarely-seen archive footage, as well as interviews with friends and acquaintances, including her former press secretary Patrick Jephson, royal correspondent and confidante Jennie Bond, and astrologer and close friend Deborah Frank

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: When holidays go right they offer much-needed rest and relaxation in the lap of luxury. However, those same vacations can just as easily end in disaster. Examples include chartered accountant Bill and his wife Tanya, who spent £11,000 on a once-in-a-lifetime cruise to the Bahamas, only to end up trapped in the eye of a cyclone. Iain and Judie's luxury dream trip to Vegas turned into deadly nightmare when they were caught up in the now infamous shootings in October 2017 in which 58 people were killed. Contributors include Danni Menzies, Scarlette Douglas and Simon Calder. Narrated by Glynis Barber

programme.title: How to Have a Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Seven women give intimate interviews about their diverse experience of orgasms, sharing a variety of stories and techniques covering a range of ages. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, there's a turning point in understanding orgasms and learning how to have a better one. For Helen, it was her first experience of lesbian sex, which made her realise how important communication is to sex, while Sam attributes it to meeting her husband, because it was the first time someone cared about her pleasure

programme.desc: The great Easter escape brings chaos to Paddington, meaning customer ambassador Natalie has to work flat out to help passengers get their long weekend off to a smooth start. programme.desc: Jon and Brennan come to the aid of an emergency services worker in Bolton, whose got behind on her housework when she began looking after her mother, who has dementia

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents an edition featuring the dangerous, sometimes bizarre and always risky consequences of combining cars with night-time drinking. In Huddersfield, four police vehicles are needed to stop a car that has failed to halt despite having a motorbike hanging precariously out of its boot, while officers chase a 4x4 from Bradford city centre to the countryside

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers deal with a four-car collision outside a primary school. They make sure all those injured or hurt are accounted for, and also set about finding out who was to blame. A speeding driver is desperate to escape from police and smashes into traffic at a junction, causing carnage before escaping on foot. He has left his passengers behind, but will they help the cops or hinder the course of the investigation? Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Operational Support Unit has to evade a guard dog when carrying out a drugs raid on a farm, while a driver thinks he can pull a fast one by impersonating his brother. Barry finds himself dealing with an irate nightclubber, Craggy has an early morning encounter with a polecat and it is a case of deja vu for Dan as he deals with the same person twice in one shift

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Twenty officers descend on a hotel to arrest members of a criminal gang in their beds, Jon and Maya raid a cannabis farm, and Craggy and Phil catch a serial bacon snatcher. Three police cars and a helicopter take on a teenage van thief, Sgt Carlin stops a driver who has a gun hidden behind his seat, and Brian reduces a time-wasting motorist to a blubbering wreck

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of the operational support unit of Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit smash through a bedroom window in a drugs raid, a speeding driver is clocked at over 140mph, and friendships are pushed to the limit when amphetamines are found in a car. Plus, vehicle thieves try - and fail - to outpace the interceptors, and an officer gets help from a very unexpected source

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Russell, a 72-year-old man is rushed into hospital by paramedics suffering from severe chest pains, while Dr Dyfrig Hughes treats Michael, who was brought in by ambulance after falling ten feet from a ladder while cutting hedges. Elsewhere, junior doctor George Kay has some exciting news to share with the team

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette is trapped with the baby, and nobody can hear her. When Emmett realises what is happening, all of his relief goes away. Brent considers whether to confess

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow wants to leave to be with Alex, causing Dean to have a meltdown. A newspaper prints a humiliating article on John's luckless encounter

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. In Hammersmith, west London, camera operators help police as they try to enforce a drinking ban on a local park and spot a group whose members may be about to break into a shop

programme.title: Million Pound Homes
programme.desc: Brits who are converting their garages into passion projects that must be seen to be believed. In Kent, plumber Grenville is on his way home to his wife and million-pound house, which he built himself. But Grenville's real pride and joy is his double-storey garage with showroom-style parking on the top level and man-cave at the bottom. But while Grenville's incredible hideaway with its pool table, bar and poker table may be the envy of all his mates, his wife Sarah is not impressed

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A woman arrives by air ambulance after falling 30ft off a castle wall and is rushed to the CT scanner to check for any life-threatening internal injuries, while a 68-year-old man in Minors is losing a lot of blood after cutting his hand on a broken glass at home. Dr Ibraheem treats a 25-year-old who has had a nasty accident while out walking his dog, with X-rays showing that he has ripped his shoulder out of joint

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A woman collapses unexpectedly during a day out with her family to an adventure park, and is left unable to move or walk. The trauma team leader diagnoses a bleed on her brain that requires urgent surgery. A neurosurgeon attempts to drain the build-up of fluid in her brain. A motorist suffers a cardiac arrest behind the wheel, caused by a large clot in an artery, and a van driver is airlifted to hospital after a major traffic collision

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes (2015)
programme.desc: A tight-knit FBI team is torn apart when the daughter of one of the agents is raped and murdered, and the case goes unsolved. Years later, a member of the team uncovers a new clue that he hopes will allow him to bring the killer to justice. However, the victim's grieving mother is dissatisfied with the law and takes matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Julia Roberts, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes (2015)
programme.desc: A tight-knit FBI team is torn apart when the daughter of one of the agents is raped and murdered, and the case goes unsolved. Years later, a member of the team uncovers a new clue that he hopes will allow him to bring the killer to justice. However, the victim's grieving mother is dissatisfied with the law and takes matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Julia Roberts, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Deep-cleaning expert George and his team face one of their toughest assignments yet - a house in Crosby, Merseyside that is almost literally bursting at the seams with clutter. Owner Paul has decided enough is enough, and he wants to sell his house and hoard to fund his retirement. But the property is infested with vermin and the kitchen a biohazard, so it is not going to be an easy sell in its current state

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, Rachel and Chris are being given the run-around by their four dogs, so trainer Graeme Hall attempts to bring the chaotic canines to heel. Cameras also focus on a case in the Midlands, where police officer Simon is being held hostage in his own home by Spaniel Pointer Cross, Dotty

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette is trapped with the baby, and nobody can hear her. When Emmett realises what is happening, all of his relief goes away. Brent considers whether to confess

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Columbo: Fade Into Murder (1976)
programme.desc: An actor who plays a detective on a soap opera is being blackmailed by his ex-lover, who is also his producer. Convinced that playing a sleuth makes him clever enough to get away with murder, he kills her and frames her husband - but has reckoned without the intervention of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner

programme.title: Columbo: A Matter of Honour (1976)
programme.desc: The sleuth's holiday in Mexico is disrupted by a bizarre death involving a suave retired bullfighter, who has killed his best friend using one of the animals as a murder weapon - but is determined his spotless image and reputation will remain untarnished. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ricardo Montalban, A Martinez and Pedro Armendariz Jr

programme.title: Columbo: Requiem for a Falling Star (1973)
programme.desc: A vicious gossip columnist digs the dirt on an ageing film actress, who responds by taking on her most challenging role yet - as a real-life murderer. But when the actress kills her own assistant in error, she looks for a way to shift the blame. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Anne Baxter, Mel Ferrer, Kevin McCarthy and multi-Oscar-winning costume designer Edith Head in a guest appearance as herself

programme.title: Columbo: Butterfly in Shades of Grey (1993)
programme.desc: A radio presenter is plotting to sabotage his adopted daughter's plans to publish her first novel and kills one of his employees for trying to help her. He thinks he has the perfect alibi, claiming that the victim was murdered while they were talking to each other on the phone, and there is a tape recording to prove it - but his ruse fails to fool the dishevelled detective. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, William Shatner and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Columbo: Uneasy Lies the Crown (1990)
programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. He plans to take revenge by poisoning the lover with his wife's heart medication, so she will be suspected - but he reckons without the attentions of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker

programme.title: Columbo Cries Wolf (1990)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth suspects the owner of a men's magazine is behind the strange disappearance of his business partner and former lover. The suspect insists the woman is still alive, while the detective struggles to prove his guilt owing to the absence of a body. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe

programme.title: Columbo: Lady in Waiting (1971)
programme.desc: A desperate woman is determined to rid herself of her domineering brother and gain control of the family business, so hatches a plan to shoot him and claim she thought he was a burglar. Although her plan seems to have worked, her new-found power goes to her head - and she also has to contend with Columbo, who is convinced of her guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leslie Nielsen and Susan Clark

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a young woman accuses a celebrity plastic surgeon and his girlfriend of sexual assault, Benson and the team must determine if the woman was attacked or if it was a night of sex games gone wrong. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial rapist strikes again after two decades of silence, and SVU operatives are determined to uncover the elusive criminal and bring justice to his many victims. Stone discovers that his father worked on the case before it went cold. Mariska Hargitay and Philip Winchester star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Suffering from the bite he sustained, Sgt Wu becomes entangled in a surprising altercation that threatens to land him in hot water. After meeting the mysterious Bonaparte, Adalind is faced with a difficult decision that could change her and Nick's lives. Meanwhile, Hank gets even closer to Zuri and their relationship begins to take shape. Back at headquarters, Eve senses that a new force may jeopardiise the entire operation. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick leans on Monroe and Rosalee as he worries that he may lose everything as he continues to battle Black Claw. Renard ramps up his campaign as election time nears, while elsewhere Adalind is faced with a very difficult decision in order to protect her children and Hank's relationship with Zuri takes an unexpected turn

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Footage of a mugging at knifepoint at a train station, and a jewellery shop raided by a gang who spray bleach in the eyes of security guards and smash down the doors with pickaxes

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica decides to upgrade from her trusty typewriter by enrolling at a computer school, where she stumbles across a case of illegal hacking - which leads to murder. The victim is one of the two men in charge of the course, and his wife and mistress are among the suspects

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A severed leg bearing a marine tattoo is discovered in a rubbish bin. Once the victim is identified, Gibbs and the crew follow the trail back to a small town, where an insurance fraud seems to have taken place. American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy widow and her daughter are implicated in the death of a hitman out on parole - and it's up to the squad to find out whether the pair hired the victim to kill a rich relative. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The squad investigates when a wealthy man is found murdered, and discover his family were all striving to get their hands on the inheritance. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-level insurance executive is murdered, and suspicion soon falls on the father of a dying nine-year-old whose claim for a life-saving leukaemia treatment was turned down. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two room-mates are found bludgeoned to death in their flat, and the handyman is the prime suspect. As his options run out, he takes a hostage, forcing Southerlyn into a course of action that could jeopardise her career. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Gene Silvers, and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is attacked and killed just hours after a serial rapist is freed on parole, prompting McCoy to pull out all the stops to bring him to justice - but before long the detective realises the wanted man could be innocent. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team races to find a sniper who is targeting marine recruitment officers and picking them off one by one. The only clue is a white feather left at the scene of each shooting - and in the absence of any other evidence, Gibbs uses himself as bait to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Sasha Alexander and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs entrusts the team with the task of finding his former commanding officer, who has gone on the run rather than staying behind to face charges of killing a marine and stealing funds. Kate and Tony's investigation leads them to the missing man's cabin - which has been sprayed with bullets and contains an unidentified corpse. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Jimmy is torn between family and work after father-in-law Ed asks him to tamper with evidence from NCIS' current murder investigation. Ed Slater's poker friend, Anthony DiNozzo Sr, offers to help with the case. Brian Dietzen, Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Robert Wagner star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are assigned to investigate the murder of a woman who was poisoned by an anonymous package, and unearth a dark secret stretching back to her childhood. They also uncover a conspiracy linked to the case that could cause huge problems for an expensive campaign being organised by the Church. Guest starring Stephen Colbert

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the mysterious drowning of a neurologist who was due to appear in court as an expert witness in a euthanasia case. They learn that the doctor was trying to communicate with the patient in question, who is in a persistent vegetative state. Guest starring John Savage

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo investigate the death of a Spanish club promoter and are surprised to find a police officer from Barcelona at the crime scene. They realise that, for diplomatic reasons, he is allowed to be there - until Mac discovers he is withholding information about the case. As the investigation proceeds, however, the New York detectives begin to suspect they are dealing with something other than a straightforward homicide. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Part one of two. Black Claw tightens its grip on Portland, making a strategic move against Hank and sending Nick on a war path. Hadrian's Wall seeks a mysterious man named Bonaparte, while Adalind and Renard learn to deal with their new and very unpredictable reality with Diana

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Part two of two. Black Claw makes a strategic move against Hank that shocks everyone and sends Nick on a warpath threatening a deadly showdown. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces out on the road and in the air to discover how CCTV and technological advances are being used to fight crime. Footage includes some residents taking neighbourhood watch to the next level, a group of thugs caught wrongdoing on a housing estate and a pensioner using her walking stick to defend herself against an intruder

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The funeral of a blues legend and subsequent killing of his former bass player plunges Jessica into the middle of a murder mystery that has remained unsolved for 20 years. Angela Lansbury, William Atherton, Logan Ramsey and Olivia Cole star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs entrusts the team with the task of finding his former commanding officer, who has gone on the run rather than staying behind to face charges of killing a marine and stealing funds. Kate and Tony's investigation leads them to the missing man's cabin - which has been sprayed with bullets and contains an unidentified corpse. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A double homicide is linked to diamonds used to fund civil war in Sierra Leone, and the detectives uncover the extent of the fighting when warring factions are found in the United States. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a sleazy retired policeman in a neighbourhood notorious for prostitution leads Briscoe and Curtis to two suburban housewives who are secretly moonlighting. However, it soon becomes apparent that whoever killed the victim could have been acting in self-defence. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky, Gerald and Kate are taken hostage by a gunman who demands evidence relating to the recent shooting of a suspected terrorist. As Gibbs and the team struggle to resolve the crisis, they are alarmed to discover there is a Hamas operative in their midst. Crime drama, guest starring Alan Dale (Ugly Betty)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Gibbs recovers from his gunshot wound, the team is called in to investigate the killing of a US Marine and tries to determine whether the crime is related to an alleged case of blackmail at an illegal nightclub. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A protected witness is shot dead in a restaurant, setting Goren and Eames on the trail of a trio of mobsters. They finally identify the key figure, but cannot find anyone willing to testify against him. Goren seeks the help of a don dying of cancer to get closer to their target. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren learns that his old enemy Nicole Wallace is engaged to the brother of a murdered health inspector, and suspects that she must have played a part in the crime - but eventually sets aside his prejudices and reluctantly enlists her help to catch the real killer. Meanwhile, Logan joins the Major Case squad, but finds himself relegated to the background, so Deakins tries to find a partner for him

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Newcomer Carolyn Barek is partnered with Logan to investigate a spate of increasingly violent jewellery shop robberies, and takes the calculated risk of revealing details about his past in a bid to ensnare a mother-and-son team of suspects - a move he finds deeply troubling. Drama, starring Annabella Sciorra and Chris Noth

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The crime drama returns with a call from a mysterious stranger igniting an explosive chain of events, with the first of a two-part story told from Castle's perspective as he searches for his Beckett. Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic star

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Part two of two. After receiving a mysterious tip from someone from her past, Beckett is launched into a fight for her life with a team of mercenaries hot on her trail. While Castle investigates why his wife is on the run, Beckett must figure out who wants her dead before they can finish the job

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a couple from Fauldhouse in West Lothian, Scotland, find their dream home in Cyprus within their £300,000 budget

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: A Hertfordshire couple search for a coastal property in France with a budget of £300,000. Presented by Jenni Falconer

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Alan and Jackie Patrick from Hampshire are keen to buy a property on the north of Spain's Costa Blanca in the Marina Alta region, close to where Jackie's brothers live. Ben Hillman show them a range of properties for their £85,000 budget, but will any character town houses have them reaching for their chequebook?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A recently married couple seek to mark the next chapter of their lives by buying a holiday apartment together in Fuerteventura, one of Spain's Canary Islands. Jean and Stuart Knight are planning to spend several weeks there every year both on their own and also with family and friends. Ben Hillman shows the pair five options within their budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jerry and Christine Steele's love of South Africa began decades ago and they have decided to spend part of their retirement in a second home among the beaches and national parks of the Garden Route stretch of the south-eastern coast. For their budget of £60,000, Laura Hamilton shows them five great value properties.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton searches for a retirement home on Spain's Costa de Almeria for Ted and Diane Brewer, who met on holiday 20 years ago and would now like to live in the sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda and Adam Cropper have been visiting Phuket in Thailand on holiday for some time and love it so much they decided to get married on the island. Now they're looking for their very own property there, initially to use as a holiday home before they move out full-time in the next few years. Jonnie Irwin guides them through the local market and shows them five properties for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram hunt for antiques in the West Country, visiting Bath, Bristol and Hungerford, before boarding a ferry to the Isle of Wight to search for nautical items

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and James Braxton are on a buying spree on the Isle of Wight, where Raj unravels the tale of one former famous local and James takes a peek beneath the waves

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram head out to hunt for antiques in the Somerset area, finding a pair of Staffordshire figures and an experimental vase, ending up at an auction in Woking

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth and the team are in Derbyshire to help a widow clear out her home, where they uncover a riding crop, a 19th-century stool and a jewellery collection

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw start in south-west Wales before heading to Somerset for auction, but some fake currency and a leg of mutton could cause them problems

programme.title: Cash in the Spare Room
programme.desc: A couple wants to create a budget-friendly log hideaway in the grounds of their property. In the Brecon Beacons, a retiree is turning an old caravan into an African-themed retreat.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: David is back to see Dr Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. Alan has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: When arrested for historic sexual offences, TV weatherman Fred Talbot tried to hide the truth in police interviews. However, his repeated response of 'no comment' spoke volumes

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Child psychologist Laverne Antrobus meets 29-year-old mother Lisa, who is bearing the brunt of extremely violent outbursts from her six-year-old daughter, Demi. Keen to understand what triggers Demi's violent episodes, Laverne attempts to understand why Lisa seems resigned to being hurt by her daughter, and in doing so, she uncovers some past trauma

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers.

programme.title: Highway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: Maria Marten: Or, Murder in the Red Barn (1935)
programme.desc: An evil squire lures a woman into marriage, but when she becomes pregnant, he decides to murder her, leaving a young gypsy who is in love with her to take the blame. Period drama, starring Tod Slaughter and Sophie Stewart

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine (1970)
programme.desc: A tyrannically strict Lancashire father brings about the downfall of his family by forcing his daughter to eat a meal against her will. Drama, starring James Mason, Diana Coupland, Susan George and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: London Votes
programme.desc: London Live's News team brings you coverage and reaction to the results of the 2021 London Mayoral Election

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events, showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Adrian Edmondson returns to his birthplace of Yorkshire to document a summer in the life of the Dales, meeting the people who live there all year round. Sixteen-year-old Phillip Mellin talks about running his family's farm alongside his mother, following the death of his father last year, while vet Neil Roberts is called out to an emergency calving

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Wilkes takes her small herd of dairy cows to compete at the Great Yorkshire Show in Harrogate, and Adrian Edmondson meets Tom Orde-Powlett, who is the heir to the historic Bolton Castle in Wensleydale. Plus, 16-year-old Phillip Mellin tries to shear sheep for the first time

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane stars as Paul Finchley, one half of a much-loved comedy double act, whose life is turned upside down when he is arrested after an accusation of rape that dates back to the 1990s. Paul adamantly denies having even met the woman making the allegation and his loyal wife (Julie Walters) must decide whether to stand by him, while his troubled daughter (Andrea Riseborough) begins to question her relationship with her father

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice (2012)
programme.desc: A bumbling teenager is offered a job by his mother's crime boss boyfriend. He is given the task of driving one of the gangster's business associates around town, only to find himself an assistant to a hitman on his last assignment, a mission that leads to a deadly encounter with a mysterious woman. Thriller, starring Tim Roth, Jack O'Connell and Talulah Riley

programme.title: Emmanuelle in Soho (1981)
programme.desc: A woman seeking fame and fortune in Soho plays a pivotal role in the struggling marriage of a photographer and his wife, and conspires with them on a plot to blackmail a pornography producer. Erotic drama, starring Angie Quick and Julie Lee

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks from Banavie to Gairlocky and around the Ribblehead Viaduct

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: Interviews on news and events from across London

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The waterhole becomes too crowded to play Coconut Catch, so Zigby decides to build a new swimming pool

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Elle the elephant hurts her trunk and Zigby decides to set up a hospital on the island

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew mistake an Irishman for a leprechaun, and help him to find his lost friend - who turns out to be a bear

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The King of Sweden accuses Halvar of stealing his jeweled sceptre. Vic must find a way to prove his father's innocence without making the king look stupid

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: This Could Go Anywhere
programme.desc: Phil Tufnell and Brendon McCullum travel all over New Zealand - playing golf and discovering the country's most famous and picturesque courses

programme.title: The Best of Men
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the birth of the Paralympics in 1948. Pioneering neurologist Dr Ludwig Guttmann arrives at Stoke Mandeville Hospital in Buckinghamshire and begins to transform the lives of his patients - Second World War servicemen with spinal cord injuries. He suggests using sport as a key part of their rehabilitation, and gets them involved in activities including wheelchair polo and basketball. Starring Eddie Marsan, Rob Brydon, George Mackay and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Maria Marten: Or, Murder in the Red Barn (1935)
programme.desc: An evil squire lures a woman into marriage, but when she becomes pregnant, he decides to murder her, leaving a young gypsy who is in love with her to take the blame. Period drama, starring Tod Slaughter and Sophie Stewart

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between 2-8 miles from around Britain. Andrew White will guide you through the best walkways that Great Britain has to offer.

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's second Vengeance weapon, the deadly V2 rocket, which was responsible for killing 3,000 people in London and the south of England during six terrifying months

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs. In the first edition, they investigate the problem of counterfeit bottles of alcohol, which are often dangerously strong, and members of an unsuspecting family have their mealtime assessed to see whether their cooking poses any health risks. The team also examines one of the most harmful bacteria

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders in 10 remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Helga, She Wolf of Stilberg (1978)
programme.desc: A sadistic female Nazi officer runs a women's prison during the Second World War, and forces the inmates to be her sexual playthings. However, the latest arrival, a determined resistance fighter, proves to be far more difficult to dominate. Prison drama, starring Malisa Longo and Patrizia Gori. In French

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Poplar for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends build a boardwalk so they can get to the water park easily

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: A story read by Zara makes Laurence keen to know if unicorns exist

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar lets Faxe steer the Drakkar home, but he becomes obsessed with chasing a whale

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's grandfather is discovered frozen alive. Once he is released from the ice, he sets out to get revenge on a giant and steal his treasure

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders in 10 remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: The Belstone Fox (1973)
programme.desc: A huntsman adopts a fox cub into his pack of hounds, and the animal becomes a local celebrity, until a disastrous hunt turns his human friends against him. Wildlife adventure based on David Rook's novel, starring Eric Porter, Bill Travers and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Silver transports Sapphire and Steel into the experimental pod from the future, where they come face to face with an adult-sized infant

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Personal reminiscences from Frenchmen who were forced by the Nazis to build ramps and construct rockets, and a look at the site of Hitler's supergun that was trained on London

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part five of eight. Sapphire and Steel subdue the changeling, but without their technician, they have no way to deconstruct the wall and defeat the creature hidden inside

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy enlists his mother-in-law's help in a pub quiz and they win, but the victory is short-lived when Diana realises she answered a question incorrectly. She insists on handing the money to the actual winning team, which happens to include Siobhan. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Father's Kingdom
programme.desc: The untold story of civil rights pioneer Father Divine, who had over a million followers worldwide and is considered the link between Marcus Garvey and Martin Luther King

programme.title: Shock and Awe (2017)
